title: Elevate Summit Introduction
synopsis: Opening introduction to the Elevate Summit — vision, goals, and what attendees can expect over two days.
who: Entrepreneurs and business owners ready to scale
brief: Neil Moncrief introduces the Elevate Summit and frames the two-day experience.

title: Leading Business Strategies for Scale
synopsis: Jon Cobb shares field-tested strategies for scaling a business beyond the founder bottleneck.
who: Business owners hitting a growth ceiling
brief: Leading Business Strategist Jon Cobb on the critical moves that separate stuck businesses from scaling ones.

title: Elite Mindset: The Inner Game of Success
synopsis: Nurhan Babazade coaches entrepreneurs on the mental frameworks that drive elite performance.
who: Entrepreneurs held back by self-limiting beliefs
brief: Elite Mindset Coach Nurhan Babazade on rewiring how you think about success.

title: Content Strategy That Converts
synopsis: Danesha Mo'Nek breaks down how to build a process-driven content strategy that consistently generates leads.
who: Entrepreneurs struggling to turn content into clients
brief: Proven Content Strategist Danesha Mo'Nek on content systems that actually convert.

title: Human Behavior and Business Resilience
synopsis: Dee Hankins applies human behavior science to help entrepreneurs build resilient businesses and teams.
who: Leaders managing teams and navigating uncertainty
brief: Human Behavior & Resilience Expert Dee Hankins on the psychology behind durable businesses.

title: Creative Direction and Marketing That Moves
synopsis: Whitney Smith reveals how creative direction and expert marketing work together to build brands people remember.
who: Business owners who want a stronger brand presence
brief: Creative Director & Marketing Expert Whitney Smith on making your brand impossible to ignore.

title: The Choreography of High Performance
synopsis: Taylor James Randall draws on cinematography and visual storytelling to teach entrepreneurs how to present their brand with impact.
who: Entrepreneurs looking to sharpen their visual and stage presence
brief: Cinematographer Taylor James Randall on the art of showing up powerfully on camera and on stage.

title: Venture Capital and the TEDx Mindset
synopsis: Maxime Andre Moulema Douala brings a venture capital lens and TEDx-stage experience to help entrepreneurs think bigger and pitch better.
who: Entrepreneurs seeking capital or looking to expand their reach
brief: Venture Capitalist and Founder of TEDx Harvard Square Maxime Andre on thinking and pitching at the highest level.

title: Key Singularity: AI as a Business Multiplier
synopsis: Karl Kimball introduces Key Singularity's approach to embedding AI into business operations for exponential leverage.
who: Business owners ready to integrate AI into their workflow
brief: AI Pioneer and Co-Founder of Key Singularity Karl Kimball on making AI work for your business.

title: Key Singularity: AI Operations in Practice
synopsis: Kristi Galus covers the operational side of deploying AI — what actually works when you move from theory to implementation.
who: Operators and founders implementing AI in their businesses
brief: AI Operations Expert and Co-Founder of Key Singularity Kristi Galus on making AI implementation stick.

title: Health as a Business Advantage
synopsis: Dr. Rajaipour connects entrepreneur health and peak physical performance directly to business outcomes.
brief: Founder of VitaRegen Medical Dr. Negin Rajaipour on why your health is your most valuable business asset.

title: HeroWorks: Vending as a Scalable Business
synopsis: Jason Funaro presents HeroWorks' model for turning vending machine businesses into scalable, semi-passive income streams.
brief: Co-Founder of HeroWorks Jason Funaro on scaling vending into a real business.

title: HeroWorks: Operations and Growth
synopsis: Brenda Roh covers the operational side of HeroWorks — logistics, placement, and growing a vending portfolio.
who: Entrepreneurs interested in vending business operations
brief: Co-Founder of HeroWorks Brenda Roh on the day-to-day of running and growing a vending business.
